items.summary: Extend the backend complaint data model to include a `statusLog` array on each complaint record. Each entry in `statusLog` should store: `status` (text: 'Pending', 'In Progress', or 'Resolved'), `updatedAt` (timestamp in nanoseconds), `updatedBy` (text, staff/admin name), and `details` (text, description of progress or resolution). Expose a new backend function `updateComplaintStatus(complaintNumber, newStatus, updatedBy, details)` that appends a new entry to the complaint's `statusLog` and updates the complaint's current `status` field. Update `migration.mo` to add an empty `statusLog` field to all existing complaint records.

On the Complaint Detail page (admin view only), add an 'Update Status' section. This section should show a form with: a Status dropdown ('Pending', 'In Progress', 'Resolved'), an 'Updated By' text field (staff/admin name), and a 'Details / Remarks' textarea for recording progress or resolution notes. Include an 'Update Status' submit button that calls the `updateComplaintStatus` backend function and refreshes the complaint data. Below the form, display the full `statusLog` history in a table with columns: Status, Updated By, Date & Time, and Details — ordered from newest to oldest. This section should only be visible to admin-role users.
